decision: Use option A as the immediate restricted-policy density route. Keep option B blocked until at least one non-step slot family passes the base-Qwen mass gate.

options.description: Sixteen natural checklist steps, each beginning with Step N: and one eligible sentence-case action opener.
risks: longer owner probes may be less natural for some tasks
model-output adherence to exactly sixteen Step N labels must be audited

options.description: Eight checklist steps plus at least eight additional non-step micro-slots.
risks: current non-step banks failed full-vocabulary mass gate
adding unvalidated extra slots would break the WP3 gate discipline
